Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk

Class SDK

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.SDK
public class SDK extends Object
Ascend OpenAPI: Combined Ascend OpenAPI spec for SDK generation

    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    SDK.AvailableServers
    AvailableServers contains identifiers for the servers available to the SDK.
    static class 
    SDK.Builder
    The Builder class allows the configuration of a new instance of the SDK.
